Lovisa Holdings Ltd. ( (AU:LOV) ) has provided an update.

Lovisa Holdings Limited has announced it will release its financial results for the half-year ended 28 December 2025 on 19 February 2026, with Global CEO John Cheston and Group CFO Chris Lauder to present the numbers via a webcast and Q&A session that morning. The scheduled results release and investor presentation underline the company’s ongoing engagement with the market and will provide shareholders and analysts with a key update on trading performance and strategic progress into the second half of FY26.

data.title: Transcenta Advances Dealmaking, Licensing and Financing to Resolve Audit Disclaimer and Bolster Liquidity
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Transcenta Holding Limited ( (HK:6628) ) has provided an announcement.

Transcenta has provided an operational update on the measures it is taking to resolve a disclaimer of opinion in its 2024 annual report, highlighting continued progress on nine key initiatives intended to strengthen its financial position and liquidity. The company is advancing term sheet-level negotiations with global and regional pharma partners and investors for its lead drug candidate osemitamab, targeting completion of one or more deals and initiation of a Phase 3 trial in 2026, while also pursuing out-licensing, joint-development arrangements and potential NewCos to fund and advance several other pipeline assets. In parallel, Transcenta is pushing diversified financing initiatives with institutional investors, has signed a non-exclusive licensing and strategic collaboration deal with EirGenix for its Highly Intensified Continuous Bioprocessing platform with potential upfront, milestone and royalty revenues, and is expanding partnerships with leading culture media and CDMO players to generate recurring technology license–linked sales and deepen its position in the global biomanufacturing supply chain.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:6628) stock is a Hold with a HK$2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Transcenta Holding Limited stock, see the HK:6628 Stock Forecast page.

More about Transcenta Holding Limited

Transcenta Holding Limited is a Cayman Islands-registered biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing novel biologic therapeutics, with a pipeline that includes lead asset osemitamab and multiple other antibody and biologic candidates. The group also operates proprietary continuous bioprocessing and cell culture technology platforms, which it is increasingly positioning for global out-licensing and strategic partnerships with pharmaceutical, biotechnology and contract manufacturing organizations.

Average Trading Volume: 1,076,973

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$1.03B

See more insights into 6628 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from V-Mart Retail Ltd ( (IN:VMART) ) is now available.

V-Mart Retail Limited has released its unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine-month period ended 31 December 2025, following approval by its Board of Directors at a meeting held on 22 January 2026. The results, which have been reviewed by statutory auditors S.R. Batliboi & Co. LLP in line with regulatory requirements, comply with Indian Accounting Standards and the Securities and Exchange Board of India’s listing regulations, with the auditors reporting no material misstatements or non-disclosures. The disclosure reinforces V-Mart’s regulatory compliance and financial reporting transparency, providing investors and other stakeholders with updated performance data for the current financial year, and the company has also made the information available on its website for wider public access.

More about V-Mart Retail Ltd

V-Mart Retail Limited is an Indian value retail chain operating in the organised retail sector, primarily focused on offering affordable fashion, general merchandise and lifestyle products to mass-market consumers across tier-II and tier-III cities. The company targets cost-conscious customers with a wide network of stores, positioning itself as a budget-friendly retailer in the increasingly competitive domestic retail market.

data.title: Spheria Emerging Companies Posts Estimated Pre-Tax NTA of $2.673 Per Share
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd. ( (AU:SEC) ) is now available.

Spheria Emerging Companies Limited reported an estimated pre-tax net tangible asset backing of $2.673 per share as at 21 January 2026, noting that this unaudited figure is approximate and calculated based on the daily value of its investment portfolio and cash balances, adjusted for relevant fees and tax movements. The company also highlighted that this NTA estimate is stated before the previously announced dividend of 3.8 cents per share, which will go ex-dividend on 27 January 2026 and be paid on 13 February 2026, signaling the income return profile for shareholders alongside the underlying asset value of the portfolio.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:SEC) stock is a Buy with a A$3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd. stock, see the AU:SEC Stock Forecast page.

More about Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd.

Spheria Emerging Companies Limited is an Australia-listed investment company that focuses on a portfolio of emerging companies, with its net tangible assets primarily driven by the daily value of its investment holdings and cash balances. The company’s returns are adjusted for management and performance fees as well as operating costs and income taxes, reflecting its role as a managed investment vehicle on the ASX under the ticker SEC.

Kanzhun Ltd. Class A ( (HK:2076) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Kanzhun Limited has announced that the trustee of its post-IPO share scheme purchased 317,400 Class A ordinary shares (equivalent to 158,700 American Depositary Shares) on the open market on 21 January 2026, funded by the company’s internal resources. The shares, acquired at an average price of US$9.44 per share and representing approximately 0.03% of Kanzhun’s total issued and outstanding share capital, will be held on trust for eligible participants under the scheme, underscoring the company’s ongoing use of equity incentives to align employee interests with shareholders and support long-term corporate development.

data.title: Li-FT Power Lifts Flow-Through Financing Price in C$40 Million Raise Tied to Winsome Deal
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Li-FT Power Ltd. ( (TSE:LIFT) ) is now available.

Li-FT Power has updated the terms of its previously announced financing tied to its proposed acquisition of Winsome Resources, increasing the issue price of its flow-through subscription receipts from C$6.45 to C$6.88, which boosts expected gross proceeds from that portion of the offering to C$26.7 million. The overall offerings, which also include non-flow-through subscription receipts and common shares and are led by a Canaccord Genuity–managed underwriting syndicate, remain targeted to raise approximately C$40 million excluding any underwriters’ options, with closing anticipated around January 29, 2026, subject to regulatory approvals, providing additional capital to advance Li-FT’s lithium projects and support its expansion strategy through the Winsome acquisition.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:LIFT) stock is a Hold with a C$4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Li-FT Power Ltd. stock, see the TSE:LIFT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:LIFT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:LIFT is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses and cash burn), partially offset by a strong low-leverage balance sheet. Technicals are supportive with a positive longer-term trend, while valuation is challenged by negative earnings and no dividend data. Recent corporate events are constructive, reflecting positive exploration progress and strategic asset consolidation.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:LIFT stock, click here.

More about Li-FT Power Ltd.

Li-FT Power Ltd. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration and development of lithium pegmatite projects. Its flagship asset is the Yellowknife Lithium Project in Canada’s Northwest Territories, complemented by three early-stage lithium exploration properties in Quebec and the Cali Project in the Northwest Territories’ Little Nahanni Pegmatite Group.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$345.7M

data.title: Mitsubishi Logisnext Corrects, Reaffirms Support for LVJ Holdings Tender Offer
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Mitsubishi Logisnext Co., Ltd. ( (JP:7105) ) just unveiled an update.

Mitsubishi Logisnext has issued a correction to its previously announced statement of opinion regarding the tender offer for its shares by LVJ Holdings 2 LLC, clarifying the description of the decision-making process around its endorsement of the offer. The company reaffirmed that, after obtaining necessary regulatory clearances and receiving confirmation from the tender offeror that all conditions precedent had been satisfied, its board reconvened — following consultation with a Special Committee and review of changes in performance and market conditions — and again concluded as of January 20, 2026 that the planned transactions will enhance corporate value and that there is no material change from its original September 30, 2025 decision to support the tender offer.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:7105) stock is a Hold with a Yen1487.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mitsubishi Logisnext Co., Ltd. stock, see the JP:7105 Stock Forecast page.

More about Mitsubishi Logisnext Co., Ltd.

Mitsubishi Logisnext Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based manufacturer in the logistics and material-handling equipment industry, best known for its forklifts and related warehouse and distribution solutions. Listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Standard Market under securities code 7105, the company focuses on supporting industrial and commercial logistics operations in Japan and globally.

Average Trading Volume: 169,313

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Bluebird Mining Ventures Raises Capital and Expands Share Base to Back Gold Streaming Growth
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Bluebird Merchant Ventures ( (GB:BMV) ) has provided an announcement.

Bluebird Mining Ventures has admitted 1,149,983,767 new ordinary shares to trading on the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange, raising approximately £626,228 through a placing, direct subscription and WRAP retail offer, while also issuing shares to a trust, to directors and consultants in lieu of salary, and as consideration under an acquisition agreement. The fundraise strengthens the company’s balance sheet and supports its pipeline of gold streaming and treasury opportunities, while a planned expansion of the board with additional non-executive directors in early 2026 is aimed at reinforcing corporate governance and aligning the board’s skills and independence with its growth strategy; following admission, the company’s share capital stands at 2,013,667,471 voting shares, clarifying the new base for regulatory disclosure thresholds.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:BMV) stock is a Hold with a £0.15 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bluebird Merchant Ventures stock, see the GB:BMV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:BMV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:BMV is a Neutral.

The score is primarily weighed down by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and persistent negative operating/free cash flow) and bearish technical positioning (price below major moving averages with negative MACD). A low-leverage balance sheet provides some support, but losses and cash burn limit valuation confidence given a negative P/E and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:BMV stock, click here.

More about Bluebird Merchant Ventures

Bluebird Mining Ventures Ltd (LSE: BMV) is a gold streaming and treasury company that builds and manages a gold-backed treasury through streaming agreements, giving investors exposure to physical gold without the operational risks or capital expenditure associated with mining. The company focuses on streams from producing assets along the ore concentrate-to-bullion value chain, securing multi-year gold flows that can be recycled into new transactions, and prioritises prudent capital allocation and treasury management to deliver sustainable, long-term shareholder value.

Average Trading Volume: 7,806,794

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £1.25M

See more insights into BMV stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

Elixir Energy Limited ( (AU:EXR) ) has shared an announcement.

Elixir Energy has disclosed a change in the indirect shareholding of director Stuart Nicholls, following the vesting and conversion of 5 million performance rights into fully paid ordinary shares held via the Nicholls Family Trust and associated superannuation account. After the transaction, Nicholls’ related entities collectively hold 11,158,666 ordinary shares, 10 million options and 15 million performance rights, with 2 million shares sold on-market at $0.0815 solely to meet tax obligations arising from the incentive vesting, a trade that took place in a closed period with prior written clearance from the company, underscoring adherence to governance and disclosure requirements.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:EXR) stock is a Hold with a A$0.09 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Elixir Energy Limited stock, see the AU:EXR Stock Forecast page.
